title: Muster: the layered Orchestrator prompt and the decisions feed

beats.caption: The Orchestrator prompt, layered: doctrine you write, blocks the composition regenerates.
beats.expectedScreen: the Orchestrator tab with editable doctrine textareas at the top and greyed locked blocks below

beats.caption: Rewrite the routing philosophy - it autosaves in place.
beats.expectedScreen: the routing philosophy textarea with the new doctrine typed and a small saved status beside its title

actions.text: Route every request to the cheapest engine that can genuinely finish it. Escalate a level on evidence - a failed gate, a blown estimate - never on vibes. When two duties both fit, prefer the narrower one.

beats.caption: The assembled system prompt already carries the new doctrine - exactly what the Operative receives.
beats.expectedScreen: the assembled-system-prompt panel of mono text with its character count header

beats.caption: Generated blocks are locked: badged, greyed, regenerated from the composition on every load.
beats.expectedScreen: the Composition readiness locked block with its regenerated-from-composition badge

beats.caption: Decisions: the live routing evidence - which duty, which level, which engine, and why.
beats.expectedScreen: the Decisions tab showing a feed of routing decision rows with kind, duty/level, reason and target columns

segments.caption: The on-disk evidence log behind the panel - digests only, never message content.
segments.expectedScreen: a pretty-printed JSON decision record with the cc-opus-high targetId line highlighted

highlight.note: a real routed decision from this composition's history - the expert Claude Code target
